# Skill Tree

The complete index of Ludeo integration skills. Grouped by purpose, with a keyword quick-lookup at the
bottom. Regenerate with `npm run build-registry`.

## Engine Integration

Integrate the Ludeo SDK into a specific engine.

- **`ludeo-unreal-integration`** — Integrate the Ludeo SDK into an **Unreal Engine** game (C++/Blueprint).
  Lifecycle, actions, state tracking, Player Flow restoration.
  → `skills/ludeo-unreal/`
- **`ludeo-unity-integration`** — Integrate the Ludeo SDK into a **Unity** game (C#, `LudeoSDK` API).
  → `skills/ludeo-unity/`

## Build & Ship

- **`cloud-upload`** — Validate, authenticate, upload a build to the Ludeo cloud, and poll until it is `ready`.
  → `skills/cloud-upload/`

## Shared reference material (not installable skills)

- SDK concepts: [Player Flow = snapshot-restore](./shared/sdk-concepts/player-flow-is-snapshot-restore.md) · [Room ≠ Highlight](./shared/sdk-concepts/room-vs-highlight.md) · [Glossary](./shared/sdk-concepts/glossary.md)

## Quick lookup

| If the user says… | Use |
| --- | --- |
| "integrate Ludeo", "add Ludeo SDK", "playable highlights" | engine skill (detect engine — see [AGENTS.md](./AGENTS.md)) |
| ".uproject", "Unreal", "Blueprint", "UE5" | `ludeo-unreal-integration` |
| "Unity", "Assets/", "MonoBehaviour", "prefab" | `ludeo-unity-integration` |
| "upload to Ludeo", "ship the build", "publish the Ludeo" | `cloud-upload` |
| "LudeoSession", "Room", "DataWriter/DataReader", "Player Flow" | engine skill |
